channel_priority_tip: Channels with higher priority are more likely to be used.
confirm_delete_channel: Are you sure you want to delete the channel ({{name}})?
max_temperature_tip: Model temperature parameter. Leave it blank if not supported.
rerank_max_token_tip: Token limit per rerank request (query + single document). Documents exceeding the limit will be automatically split.
selected_model_empty: Please select at least one model.
vlm_model_tip: Generates additional indexes for images in documents within the knowledge base.
model_permission_config_hint: If no collaborators are added, all members are available by default
evaluation_model_tip: Used to evaluate apps and quality of data in datasets.
train_base_model_tip: Only rerank and embedding models are supported
train_select_base_model_first: Please select a base model first
base_model_train_tip: Base model training can generate a new model for use in apps and knowledge bases.
train_detail_rerank_result_tip:
Precision@5: The proportion of correct knowledge in the top 5 results of knowledge reranking. A higher ratio indicates better reranking accuracy.

Precision@10: The proportion of correct knowledge in the top 10 results of knowledge reranking. A higher ratio indicates better reranking accuracy.

MRR@10: The rank position of the first correct knowledge in the top 10 reranked results. A higher rank score is better (score is 1 for rank 1, 0 if not in top 10). Used to measure whether reranking can place the correct knowledge at the top.
train_detail_embedding_result_tip:
Precision@5: The proportion of correct knowledge in the top 5 recall results. A higher ratio indicates better recall accuracy.

Precision@10: The proportion of correct knowledge in the top 10 recall results. A higher ratio indicates better recall accuracy.

MRR@10: The rank position of the first correct knowledge in the top 10 recall results. A higher rank score is better (score is 1 for rank 1, 0 if not in top 10). Used to measure whether recall can place the correct knowledge at the top.
train_detail_result_worse_tip: The current evaluation metric did not improve over the previous version. To avoid performance fluctuation, the model was not updated this time.
